name: flowspec
description: Compile confirmed UX discovery into prototype-ready UX Flow Specs.

interface.shortDescription: Generate traceable UX Flow Specs from UX-partner outputs.
interface.longDescription: Flowspec compiles confirmed UX discovery into prototype-ready UX Flow Specs with traceability, deterministic validation, and B2B craft review.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Flowspec to prepare a UX Flow Spec from a confirmed UX-partner project.
